ast.name: error
ast.target: 创建商业模型画布时出错：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the name of your business. This will be used in the canvas file name.
ast.target: 输入您的企业名称。这将用于画布文件名。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 商业模型画布创建成功！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create business model canvas. Check if the folder is read-only.
ast.target: 创建商业模型画布失败。请检查文件夹是否为只读。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F91D} Key Partners

* Who are our Key Partners?
* Who are our key suppliers?
* Which Key Resources are we acquiring from partners?
* Which Key Activities do partners perform?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### 🤝 关键合作伙伴

* 我们的关键合作伙伴是谁？
* 我们的主要供应商是谁？
* 我们从合作伙伴那里获取哪些关键资源？
* 合作伙伴执行哪些关键活动？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u2699\uFE0F Key Activities

* What Key Activities do our Value Propositions require?
* Our Distribution Channels?
* Customer Relationships?
* Revenue streams?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### ⚙️ 关键活动

* 我们的价值主张需要哪些关键活动？
* 我们的分销渠道？
* 客户关系？
* 收入来源？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F4E6} Key Resources

* What Key Resources do our Value Propositions require?
* Our Distribution Channels?
* Customer Relationships?
* Revenue streams?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### 📦 关键资源

* 我们的价值主张需要哪些关键资源？
* 我们的分销渠道？
* 客户关系？
* 收入来源？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F465} Customer Segments

* For whom are we creating value?
* Who are our most important customers?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### 👥 客户细分

* 我们为谁创造价值？
* 谁是我们最重要的客户？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F4C9} Cost Structure

* What are the most important costs inherent in our business model?
* Which Key Resources are most expensive?
* Which Key Activities are most expensive?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### 📉 成本结构

* 我们商业模式中最重要的成本是什么？
* 哪些关键资源最昂贵？
* 哪些关键活动最昂贵？

[在此处输入...]

ast.name: text
ast.source:
### \u{1F4C8} Revenue Streams

* For what value are our customers really willing to pay?
* For what do they currently pay?
* How are they currently paying?
* How would they prefer to pay?
* How much does each Revenue Stream contribute to overall revenues?

[Type here...]
ast.target:
### 📈 收入来源

* 客户真正愿意为什么价值付费？
* 他们目前为什么付费？
* 他们目前如何支付？
* 他们更倾向于如何支付？
* 每个收入来源对总收入的贡献是多少？

[在此处输入...]
